raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "describes a recommended spiritual practice as one of the steps in a recovery program",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God exists with whom conscious contact is possible",
    "prayer and meditation can improve such contact",
    "God possesses a specific will for individuals",
    "knowledge of that will is obtainable and actionable"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a theistic framework that posits a personal deity with knowable intentions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the individual accepts a theistic worldview, finds prayer/meditation subjectively beneficial, and attributes improved functioning or sobriety to the practice",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no deity exists, prayer is inert, or the practice substitutes supernatural reliance for evidence-based agency and coping skills"
}
